results.title: "If Government Wants To Talk, It Must Come To Us": CJP's Abhijeet Dipke
results.description: Abhijeet Dipke, the founder of the Cockroach Janta Party, a satirical movement that began two months ago, has made it clear: the government has to take the lead.

results.title: Seoul mayor fined 10 million won in polling scandal, putting seat at risk
Free SHS should be funded with local revenue, not loans – Gideon Boako
results.description: The Deputy Ranking Member on Parliament’s Finance Committee and Tano North MP, Dr Gideon Boako, has argued that the Free Senior High School (Free SHS) programme should continue to be financed through domestic revenue rather than borrowed funds. Speaking in Parliament on Tuesday, Dr Boako said government must demonstrate its commitment to education by allocating [...]

results.title: Lawsuits allege years of child abuse, torture and death in San Bernardino County foster homes
results.description: Among the claims are missed warning signs, inadequate oversight and failures to protect foster children from abuse and neglect.

results.title: Donald Trump Scores Major Win in Arizona
results.description: Arizona just handed Donald Trump exactly what he wanted. A key Republican primary result could set the stage for one of the most fiercely contested governor’s races in the country. Andy Biggs wins Arizona primary election Andy Biggs, the hard-right congressman endorsed by Donald Trump, won the Republican primary for Arizona governor on Tuesday, according [...] The post Donald Trump Scores Major Win in Arizona appeared first on Mandatory .
